review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI re-review verified the prior P2 machine-enforcement gap is fixed, the H00 preflight acceptance gate definition remains bound to RP00.P00.M08.S02, M08.S01 remains production_ready as completed scope inventory, required closeout evidence checks are enforced at production_ready, and no prohibited production, real-data, generation approval, C00 replacement, human replacement, M08 completion, or RP00 completion claim is made.

findings.title: Prior P2 fixed: command-evidence writes_product_state=false and blocked_claims array are now machine-enforced
findings.details: The production_ready closeout loop now has a dedicated RP00.P00.M08.S02 block that verifies blocked_claims is an array and writes_product_state is false.

findings.title: Prior P3 fixed or acceptable: every command row exit_code 0 and required preflight fields are enforced
findings.details: The validator now checks every command row for exit_code 0 and directly verifies the required preflight evidence fields used by the H00 packet.

findings.title: Strict evidence enforcement runs at production_ready promotion by design
findings.details: The production_ready closeout evidence loop runs only after the closeout status is promoted to production_ready. This matches prior subphase sequencing and the S02 command evidence satisfies the strict checks.
findings.recommendation: Attach Claude review, adjudication, and construction inspection before promotion; this closeout does so.

findings.title: Binding, scope preservation, and prohibited-claim boundaries all hold
findings.details: h00_preflight_acceptance_gate_definition binds to RP00.P00.M08.S02, M08.S01 remains a completed production_ready scope inventory, next_subphase is RP00.P00.M09.S01, and non-goal boundaries disclaim production mutation, real data, generation approval, C00 replacement, human replacement, M08 completion, and RP00 completion.

parsed_review.review_notes: Initial actual Claude CLI review returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with one P2 validation-theater gap and one P3 partial-enforcement note. The validator was updated to enforce writes_product_state=false, blocked_claims array, required preflight evidence fields, and every command row exit_code 0. Final actual Claude CLI re-review returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with only non-blocking P3 confirmation notes.
